meanings.definition: moderate or restrain; lessen the force of
examples: He bated his breath when talking about this affair

meanings.definition: flap the wings wildly or frantically; used of falcons
soak in a special solution to soften and remove chemicals used in previous treatments
strike with, or as if with a baseball bat

examples: Jones bats first, followed by Martinez

meanings.definition: beat thoroughly and conclusively in a competition or fight
examples: We licked the other team on Sunday!
